text.title: Continuous Discovery Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Continuous Discovery. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: interview-and-graft
step.action: Per touchpoint: graft new opportunities + solutions under outcome.

decision-gate.p: After step 4, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
